resolution: Added _protected=[Depends(require_api_key)] to all legacy routers in app.py
commit: fix(security): enforce API key auth on legacy routes (Finding #1 — Critical)

description: Kein @limiter.limit() auf Compute-Endpoints — unbegrenzte CPU-Auslastung möglich
resolution: Added @limiter.limit("30/minute") to bazi/western/fusion, @limiter.limit("60/minute") to validate; added reset_rate_limiter autouse fixture to conftest.py
commit: fix(security): add rate limiting to compute endpoints (Finding #2 — High)

description: Auth disabled wenn FUFIRE_API_KEYS leer — fly.toml setzt kein FUFIRE_REQUIRE_API_KEYS
resolution: Added FUFIRE_REQUIRE_API_KEYS=true and WEBHOOK_HMAC_ONLY=true to fly.toml [env]
commit: fix(security): set FUFIRE_REQUIRE_API_KEYS=true in fly.toml (Finding #3 — High)

description: Tier nur aus Key-Präfix, kein Server-Side-Lookup, kein Revocation
resolution: Added FUFIRE_KEY_TIER_OVERRIDES env var (comma-separated key:tier pairs); _load_tier_overrides() checked before prefix parsing, allowing operator correction without DB
commit: feat(security): add FUFIRE_KEY_TIER_OVERRIDES for server-side tier correction (Finding #4)

resolution: Removed duplicate app.include_router(webhooks.router) without /internal prefix; only /internal/api/webhooks/chart remains

description: X-RateLimit-Remaining zeigt immer Vollquota — täuscht B2B-Clients
resolution: Removed setdefault fallback for X-RateLimit-Remaining from middleware; absent header is honest. X-RateLimit-Limit still set from tier info. slowapi writes Remaining on @limiter.limit() routes once endpoints expose response: Response param
commit: fix(security): remove phantom X-RateLimit-Remaining fallback from middleware (Finding #6)

resolution: Replaced all f-string exception details with structured {error, message, detail:{}} envelope
commit: fix(security): sanitize webhook error responses (Findings #7, #15 — Low)

resolution: Added CORSMiddleware with configurable CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var (defaults: bazodiac.space + localhost dev ports)
commit: fix(security): add CORSMiddleware with configurable origins (Finding #8 — Medium)

resolution: Added Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains via setdefault in middleware.py
commit: fix(security): add HSTS header to middleware (Finding #9 — Low)

description: HMAC-Replay-Schutz durch Method 2/3 (simple key/bearer) vollständig unterlaufen
resolution: Added hmac_only: bool=False param; when True, skips Method 2/3 fallbacks; WEBHOOK_HMAC_ONLY=true set in fly.toml
commit: fix(security): add hmac_only mode for webhook auth (Finding #10 — Medium)

description: Kein Key-Generierungsskript, Entropie des Random-Parts unbekannt
resolution: Added scripts/generate_api_key.py using secrets.token_hex(16) — 128-bit entropy, ff_<tier>_<32-hex> format
commit: feat(security): add API key generation script with 128-bit entropy (Finding #11 — Medium)

description: Keine Audit-Logs für Auth-Events (401, dev-mode, webhook-failures)
resolution: Added _log.warning() for dev-mode pass-through, 401 events in auth.py; webhook auth failures in services/auth.py
commit: fix(security): add audit logging for auth events (Finding #12 — Medium)

description: Sync urlopen im async Context, kein Geocoding-Cache
resolution: Rewrote geocode_place() to async def using httpx.AsyncClient with 5s timeout; updated webhooks.py to await
commit: fix(security): convert geocoding to async httpx (Finding #13 — Medium)

resolution: Added docstring documenting cache_clear() revocation pattern and Fly redeploy as standard rotation path
commit: docs(security): document lru_cache revocation behavior (Finding #14 — Low)

resolution: Changed 500 to 503 with structured error envelope {error: service_unavailable} — env-var name no longer leaked
commit: fix(security): sanitize webhook error responses (Findings #7, #15 — Low)
